title: Oh No! Another TNT Mod!
description: A TNT mod adding to the oversaturated, pee filled pool of TNT mods.
body:
***ALL DEVELOPMENT HAS BEEN MOVED TO CURSEFORGE***
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-no-another-tnt-mod 

This mod adds a bunch of TNT, as well as other items related to explosions. All of which have recipes. I recommend using JEI for that. I am not responsible for any irreversible damage caused by the items added by this mod. Although I will say that the Bomb on a stick is quite useful if you're looking for a... "quick getaway". I plan on updating this mod to 1.17 as soon as I can. Potential Fabric port as well.
